trivia: The only full double-deck airliner ever built, and the largest passenger aircraft in history. Production ended in 2021, but the survivors returned from desert storage because passengers simply love them.
You will hear the strange part on ADS-B days: something this enormous approaches in near silence, then fills the entire sky.
funFacts: Wingspan of nearly 80 meters, wider than a football field is long.
Emirates operates the vast majority of the world's fleet.
